name: Blender to Notion
description: Renders the current Blender scene and creates a Notion documentation page with the render.
prompt: Render the current Blender scene at 800x600 resolution with 128 samples. Then create a Notion page inside parent page {parentId} with the title '{title}'. In the page body, describe what is in the scene based on what you can see in the render, and embed the render image as the page cover if possible.

params.name: title
params.description: Title for the Notion documentation page

params.name: parentId
params.description: Notion parent page ID (found in the page URL)
